case_title: JAMES DE SOTO BAIL BONDS VS. OSWALD A. ESCALANTE et al

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF JAMES DE SOTO BAIL BONDS SERVED AUG-12-2008, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT ESCALANTE, ROXANA

SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE HELD, CASE SETTLED. SETTLEMENT TERMS ARE NOT PLACED ON THE RECORD THIS DATE. SETTLEMENT PROTECTION DATE SET FOR 4/13/09 AT 9:00 AM IN DEPARTMENT 206. TRIAL DATE IS MAINTAINED. COUNSEL ORDERED TO PREPARE A NOTICE OF SETTLEMENT. JUDGE KATHERINE FEINSTEIN, MELINKA JONES, ANN MENDOZA, CSR 6812
